title: Big tech earnings and the current AI debates, with Sarah Guo and Elad Gil
full_text: Host-only episode discussing NVIDIA, Meta and Google earnings, Gemini and Mistral model launches, the open-vs-closed source debate, domain specific foundation models, if we’ll see real competition in chips, and the state of AI ROI and adoption.
